name: Coomassie Brilliant Blue Staining (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. 固定：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
components.note: 轻柔摇晃, 防止凝胶变形

components.name: 3. 脱色 I：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
4. 脱色 II：5% 甲醇 / 7% 乙酸
components.note: 换液 2–3 次直到背景清晰; 加纸巾吸附色素加速

notes.en: Sensitivity: ~100 ng protein/band. For higher sensitivity use Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff method, ~10 ng) or silver stain (~1 ng). CBB G-250 (Colloidal) requires no fixation and has lower background. Microwave shortcut: stain 30s MW → rock 5 min → destain 30s MW → rock 5 min, complete in ~15 min. Store gel in 7% acetic acid or dry.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：~100 ng 蛋白/条带。更灵敏可用 Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff 法, ~10 ng) 或银染 (~1 ng)。CBB G-250 (Colloidal) 不需固定步骤且背景更低。微波加速法：染色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min → 脱色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min，可在 15 min 内完成。凝胶可保存在 7% 乙酸中或干燥保存。

ref: Neuhoff et al. (1988) Electrophoresis 9:255; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

stoppingPoints.condition: Store in ddH₂O or 7% acetic acid

usage.en: Visualize protein bands in SDS-PAGE gels using Coomassie Brilliant Blue staining.
usage.zh: 考马斯亮蓝染色可视化 SDS-PAGE 胶中的蛋白条带。

briefSteps.en: Fix gel in 50% methanol/10% acetic acid → stain with 0.1% CBB R-250 → destain with 50% methanol/10% acetic acid then 5% methanol/7% acetic acid until background is clear → store or scan.
briefSteps.zh: 50% 甲醇/10% 乙酸固定凝胶 → 0.1% CBB R-250 染色 → 50% 甲醇/10% 乙酸脱色，再换 5% 甲醇/7% 乙酸脱至背景清晰 → 保存或扫描成像。

detailedSteps.en: Place SDS-PAGE gel in a clean container. Add fixation solution (50% methanol, 10% glacial acetic acid in ddH₂O) with at least 3× gel volume. Rock gently for 30 min at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 SDS-PAGE 凝胶置于干净容器，加入至少 3 倍凝胶体积的固定液（50% 甲醇、10% 冰乙酸），室温轻柔摇晃 30 min。

detailedSteps.en: Discard fixation solution. Add Coomassie staining solution (0.1% CBB R-250, 50% methanol, 10% acetic acid). Rock on shaker for at least 1 h (or overnight for deeper staining).
detailedSteps.zh: 弃去固定液，加入考马斯染色液（0.1% CBB R-250、50% 甲醇、10% 乙酸），摇床摇晃至少 1 h（过夜染色更深）。

detailedSteps.en: Discard staining solution. Add destain solution I (50% methanol, 10% acetic acid). Rock for 30 min, then discard.
detailedSteps.zh: 弃去染色液，加入脱色液 I（50% 甲醇、10% 乙酸），摇晃 30 min 后弃去。

detailedSteps.en: Add destain solution II (5% methanol, 7% acetic acid). Change solution every 30 min, 2–3 times, until background is clear and protein bands are visible. Adding a crumpled paper towel to the container accelerates dye absorption.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入脱色液 II（5% 甲醇、7% 乙酸），每 30 min 换液一次，换 2–3 次，直至背景清晰、条带可见。容器中放入皱纸巾可加速色素吸附。

detailedSteps.en: Rinse gel briefly with ddH₂O. Scan or photograph the gel using a gel imaging system. Store gel submerged in ddH₂O or 7% acetic acid in a sealed container at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: ddH₂O 简短冲洗凝胶，用成像仪扫描或拍照。凝胶浸泡在 ddH₂O 或 7% 乙酸中密封保存于室温。

note.en: Stained gel (before destaining) can be left in staining solution overnight at room temperature with no loss of quality.
note.zh: 染色后的凝胶（脱色前）可在染色液中室温放置过夜，不影响质量。

note.en: Fully destained gel can be stored in ddH₂O or 7% acetic acid at room temperature for weeks.
note.zh: 完全脱色后的凝胶可浸泡在 ddH₂O 或 7% 乙酸中室温保存数周。
